handoff.reason: 7-phase audit plan authored and validated. Phase 1 (source-headers fresh pass) ready for execution.

execution_rules.on_hard_stop: N/A — no hard stops in this audit plan
execution_rules.test_suite_gate: npx vitest run must remain 1495 passing if any code changes are made
execution_rules.constraint: Do not touch dispatch-008/009/007 — owned by Instance 1

hard_constraints: Test suite must remain green (1495 passing) if any fixes applied
Do not overwrite hand-curated @used_by or @constraints fields
Do not touch Phase 3-4 of WO-CORE-QUALITY-DEPTH-PASS-001 (Instance 1 owns)

phase_transitions.note: Phase 1: --source-headers gap-fill run. Baseline: missing=343 stale=1112 defined=956. After: unchanged — all fillable files already stamped. No new delta.
Phase 2: type distribution confirmed. interface=400, type=60 present. ConversionOptions exported:true. convertGraphToElements exported:true. tree-sitter fix (6a28e62) verified.
Phase 3: 922 export edges. graph-to-elements=3, types=100, utils/fs=20. Spot-checks pass. Zero duplicate export edges.

Phase 4: 2367 import edges. resolved=48, unresolved=1344, external=556, typeOnly=341, dynamic=78. Empty targets for unresolved/external are by design (resolutionStatus field documents them). No broken paths.

Phase 5: --constraint type:class returns 2 results (class-only), unfiltered returns 10 — filter active. --constraint layer:service returns 0 — layer not in vector metadata (finding: layer field not propagated to vector chunks).

Phase 6: nodes have id+type+name but missing label+layer at top level (uses metadata.layer pattern). 25728/30216 edge targets empty for unresolved/external imports — by design. No null id or type fields.
Phase 7: --top-k 50 returns all 50 results, no truncation. --max-tokens not implemented. agentic-context.json has no truncation fields. Finding: no active smart truncation at rag-search CLI layer.

audit_findings.finding: source-headers gap-fill at floor — 343 missing files cannot be stamped (non-TS/non-JS or design exclusions). Stale=1112 requires --overwrite-headers to reduce further.
layer field not propagated to RAG vector chunk metadata. --constraint layer:<value> always returns 0. Only type, file, lang, exported, capability constraints are functional.
audit_findings.action: File stub or improvement: propagate @layer from semantic header into vector chunk metadata at index time.

audit_findings.finding: Graph node schema uses 'name' not 'label'. 'layer' not in top-level node fields — in metadata.layer if semantic headers present. Viz consumers must map name→label and metadata.layer→layer.
No smart truncation at rag-search CLI level. --max-tokens flag not implemented. Large --top-k queries return unbounded output.
audit_findings.action: File stub: implement --max-tokens truncation in rag-search CLI, preserve top-scored results under limit.

communication_log.message: WO-LEVERAGE-AUDIT-FRESH-PASS-001 created. 7-phase phased audit plan. No hard stops. Instance 2 scope per DISPATCH-2026-05-15-011.

All 7 audit phases complete. 1495 tests passing. Key findings: (1) source-headers at floor — 343 missing unfillable; (2) tree-sitter fix confirmed; (3) export edges 922, no dupes; (4) import resolution working (unresolved/external by design); (5) --constraint type works, layer does not (not in vector metadata); (6) graph node label/layer field naming gap; (7) no rag-search truncation implemented.
